message:
feat(core): add Update stage and event names for self-update operations

- Add Update stage to logging Stage enum for self-update/rollback ops
- Add event names for update lifecycle: backup, download, verify, rollback
- Make network and proc_parsers modules public for testing access

Supports the rollback-safe self-update mechanism from 8e6f218.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
